page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 16 physical Intel Xeon 6462C cores, operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server does not include local storage or onboard GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps to handle external communication and storage traffic. The dedicated CPU allocation model ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, offering consistent processing capabilities.

Given its balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio and dedicated high-frequency Intel Xeon cores, this instance is suitable for workloads requiring reliable CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead. Common applications include general-purpose web serving, application servers, build systems, and medium-sized database deployments that do not require local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.4xlarge is a KVM-based virtual server utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical Intel Xeon 6462C cores running at 3.3 GHz, with a single thread per core. The system includes 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and providing a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high clock speed, the server is designed for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without resource contention. It is suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, and distributed enterprise workloads.
